repair_history.diagnosis:
/CaseProject/modified_model.aadl | line 104: Couldn't resolve reference to 'Mode'.: Mode is referenced before being declared in the same annex block -> Move the equation defining Mode above the guarantee that references it
/CaseProject/modified_model.aadl | line 104: left and right sides of binary expression '*' are of type '<error>' and 'int', but must be of the same type: Mode is unresolved, so the expression 'Mode * Pedal' has type '<error>' -> Fix the equation defining Mode to use only visible symbols
/CaseProject/modified_model.aadl | line 104: left and right sides of binary expression '=' are of type 'int' and '<error>', but must be of the same type: Mode is unresolved, so the expression 'CMD = (Mode * Pedal)' has type mismatch -> Fix the guarantee to reference a valid expression for Mode
/CaseProject/modified_model.aadl | line 122: Couldn't resolve reference to 'Agree_Nodes::Brake_Mode'.: Agree_Nodes package is not imported or referenced correctly -> Remove or rewrite the reference to Agree_Nodes::Brake_Mode using only visible symbols
/CaseProject/modified_model.aadl | line 137: Couldn't resolve reference to 'Agree_Nodes::Brake_Cmd'.: Agree_Nodes package is not imported or referenced correctly -> Remove or rewrite the reference to Agree_Nodes::Brake_Cmd using only visible symbols
